prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约1730名、43252名（2022年土木断档）、4934名、3287名、4316名。排除2022年断档异常值后，近3年位次在3287–4934区间波动，2025年基准约4316名，整体呈小幅后移趋势；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年114人、2022年114人、2023年109人、2024年106人、2025年126人、2026年169人。2026年较2025年大幅扩招约34%，名额显著增加，理论上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第18名，稳居全国Top20，学校层次极高，对高分考生持续具有强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假、院长被免职等），可能轻微抑制部分考生报考热情；抖音热度排名第26（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年河南曾出现严重断档（土木工程专业暴跌103分），但2023–2025年已逐步恢复，历史断档的滞后影响基本消退；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A、交通运输工程A、工商管理A等17个学科获A-及以上评级，工科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，报考意愿强烈；土木建筑类虽仍偏劝退但已趋稳。河南省2026年高考报名总人数约120万，较2025年（物理类55.5万+历史类35.2万≈90.7万）大幅增加，按近年物理类占比约61%估算，2026年物理类考生约73万，较2025年增约32%，竞争显著加剧。；同济大学位于上海（一线城市），对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大（2026年物理类169人），属该校在外省的主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4316名、2026年大幅扩招34%与河南省考生总数增加约32%的供需对冲、声誉偏负面轻微降温、工科专业高热推荐等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约5000名，区间4500–5500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划班）
- 工科试验班（信息类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智慧建造与低碳环境类）
- 理科试验班
- 工科试验班（智能化制造与新能源类）
- 医学试验班（国豪精英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在4500–5500区间，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次在区间下限（4500名左右）可重点冲刺国豪精英班和卓越计划班；位次在区间中段（5000名左右）以信息类、智慧建造类、理科试验班为主；位次在区间上限（5500名左右）建议以医学类和智能交通类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1730, 43252 (2022 civil engineering cutoff), 4934, 3287, and 4316 respectively. Excluding the 2022 cutoff anomaly, the rankings fluctuated between 3287 and 4934 in the past three years, with a baseline of about 4316 in 2025, showing a slight overall downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 114 in 2021, 114 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 106 in 2024, 126 in 2025, and 169 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a significant expansion of about 34%, with a notable increase in slots, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 18th, firmly in the national Top 20, with an extremely high university level, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may mildly suppress some candidates' enthusiasm for application. Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. In 2022, Henan experienced a severe cutoff (civil engineering major dropped by 103 points), but from 2023 to 2025, it has gradually recovered, and the lagging impact of the historical cutoff has largely dissipated. 17 disciplines, including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Transportation Engineering A, Business Administration A, etc., have received A- or above ratings, with engineering strength at the national top, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with strong social popularity and strong application willingness. Although civil engineering and architecture are still somewhat discouraged, they have stabilized. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from 2025 (physics category 555,000 + history category 352,000 ≈ 907,000). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 61%, it is estimated that the physics category candidates in 2026 will be about 730,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai (a first-tier city), which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (169 in physics category in 2026), making it one of the main source regions for the university outside its home province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4316, the significant 34% expansion in 2026, the supply-demand offset from the approximately 32% increase in total Henan candidates, the slight cooling effect from the slightly negative reputation, and the high recommendation for engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease (competition slightly intensifies) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5000, with a range of 4500 to 5500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Low-Carbon Environment Category)
- Science Experimental Class
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy Category)
- Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Transportation and Vehicle Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the 4500–5500 range. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates at the lower end of the range (around 4500) can focus on aiming for the Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class. Candidates in the middle of the range (around 5000) should primarily consider Information Category, Smart Construction Category, and Science Experimental Class. Candidates at the upper end of the range (around 5500) are advised to use Medical Category and Intelligent Transportation Category as safety options.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次578名、2026年招生计划持平、河南省历史类考生总数大幅增加约33%、声誉偏负面轻微降温等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（竞争加剧），预测最低位次约593名，区间526–660名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 617, 669, 544, 539, and 578 respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 539–669 range, with a baseline of about 578 in 2025, showing overall stability with a slight forward trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 12 in 2025, and 12 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks approximately 18th, firmly in the national Top 20. As a comprehensive university, its liberal arts programs also have brand effects. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. Liberal arts-related disciplines such as Foreign Language and Literature (A-), Marxist Theory (A-), and Law (indirectly associated through Business Administration A, etc.) have received A- or higher ratings, demonstrating competitiveness in liberal arts even within a strong engineering university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a recommended social popularity (slightly hot), while humanities and social science majors maintain stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million. Based on the recent proportion of history category students at about 39%, the estimated number of history category examinees in 2026 is about 470,000, an increase of approximately 33% compared to 352,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Henan liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Henan is small (12 students), making competition relatively fierce.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 578, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 33% in the total number of history category examinees in Henan Province, and a slight cooling effect from the negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward (due to intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 593, with a range of 526–660.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Political Science and Public Administration
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 526–660, with only 3 liberal arts majors. It is recommended to prioritize Law and Political Science and Public Administration as main choices, with the Humanities Experimental Class as a safety option. For rankings near the lower end of the range (around 526), one can aim for Law; for rankings in the middle (around 593), focus equally on Law and Political Science; for rankings near the upper end (around 660), it is advisable to use the Humanities Experimental Class as a safety option.
